titleStmt.title: SII 22.326: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 326. (A.R. No. 326 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. RUINED VISHṆU TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: This consists of a number of disconnected pieces of one or more inscriptions. The first piece mentions a sale of land tax-free, by the sabhā of Arumoḻidēva-chaturvēdimaṅgalam to the temple of Perumānaḍigaḷ at Gōvindapāḍi. Piece 2 refers to some persons reciting the puṇyapam (?). Piece 5 mentions some items of requirements of worship to the deity on the day of Tiruvādirai in Mārgaḻi month. Piece 6 similarly lists some requirements of worship and refers to four persons reciting the Tiruvāymoḻi in the temple and to 50 persons versed in the vedic lore. It quotes the 21st year of a king whose name is lost and ends with the mention of a sale of land tax-free by the assembly of Veṇpākkam to the temple at Govindapāḍi for the gold received by them.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tikke kiḻakku vāykkālukke ñcatirattuṇṭattu kollainilam malai patiṉṉaṟukālum kiḻmel patiṉṉaṟukālum kaiyvantavāṟkula kuḻi Irunūṟṟu Aimpattu yum ṅkaḷukku Uriya melni
rum kiḻṇirum kiṇaṟṟukiḻnik koḷḷavum pāccavum peṟuvatākavum Inilam cuṭṭivanta nirvilai cuṭṭivanta Iṟai Uḷḷatu maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭitum kāṭṭappeṟātomākavum Icuṭṭappaṭṭa kollainilattu kuṭiiruntu Inilattukku Uḻukuṭi Iruvarum Ettam Eṭu
kkum kuṭi nālvaraiyum Ittevar Iṟaiy Iruntāraiyum Amañci veṭṭivetiṉai ciṟṟiṟai coṟumāṭṭu kāṭṭappeṟātomākavum Ipparicu Icaintu candrādittavat Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttom śrīkovintapāṭi niṉṟaruḷiya perumā ṉaṭikaḷukku Arumoḻite
vaśaturvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom Ipparicu Allatu Iṟaikāṭṭiṉ nomai śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷ dhanmāsanam Uḷḷiṭṭu tāṉ veṇṭukovukku per poṉ Aiṅkaḻañcu poṉ maṉṟa peṟuvatākavum manṟupāṭu Iṟuttu Inṉam Iṟaiyili celuttik kuṭuppomānno—

—mum Ūrkiḻ Aṭṭa nellu tūṇippatakkum Āṭiyaruḷa ney nāḻi Uḻakkum llum kallu ḻukuṟuṇiyum tiruccuṇṇattukku mañcaḷukku nellut tūṇippatakkum citārikku nellu kuṟuṇiyum van=timandravyattukku nellu tūṇiyum van=tamandravyam paṟippāṟku nel kuṟuṇiyum can=taṉattukkum svarntattukkum Ulokattukkum nellu Irukalamum puṇyapam vācippārkku pākkum—

san=tiviḷakku 2 10- kukku Eṇṇai
yamutukkum neyamutukkum Uppukku miḷaku
amutukkum nelluk kalane
nel kalamum kalacam Eṭuppār
tiruvārātaṉai ceyyum pirāmaṇa

iravu Appamutu ceyya ve
kku ḷa Irukalamum pirāmaṇar po
coḻamaṇṭalattu Uyyakkoṇṭā
kuṟuṇiyāka I nānāḻi
n=takanallūr māṉanilaṉ
ittarmam Uḷḷiṭṭu tiruvulakaḷan=ta
viḷakku Oṉṟinukku kācukallāl
nivan=tam celuttuvom Ittevar
tevatāṉam tāmaṟkoṭṭattu tāmarnāṭṭu
nna veṭaṅkoṟṟaṉkulal śrīkṛṣṇa

ṭutteṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟi
veṭaṅku ppuliye ṭṭi
yaṟiven mokiliyan ciṅkaṉ
kuraneṉ ḻāṉ tevaṉ kuṭṭiyen
ṉveṭṭaṅkoṟṟaṉ poṉnāli tāmotirane ttāṇṭuvarai marakkālāl Aḷantu nellu Aiṅkalam
Iṉnel koṇṭu ceyyum nivantamāvatu Āḻvāṟku
mārkaḻit tiruvātiraināṉṟu tirukkāppuṉāṇ cārttiaruḷa Aricikkum tiruccuṉṉakkārttikaiy Arici Uḻakku Aricikku kalacam Uḷḷiṭṭu Iṭuṅ kucavanukku ḷa

yum teṉ ne
veṟṟilai kkum nellup patakkum perun=tiruvamutukku Arici ttukku nel Irukalanetū
ṇippatakkum kaṟiyamutukkum kaṭukukkum Aṭaikkā patakkum paricaṭṭam Orraṇaikku nel mukkalamum kku nellirutūṇiyum tukku dekṣiṇai
kku nellut tūṇippatakkum tiruvāymoḻi viṇṇappam ceyvār nālvar kku nellu nāṟkalamum tirukkaṇṇāmaṭaikku veṇṭuvanavaiyikku nel nāṟkalamu
ṇṭuvanavaiyiṟṟu nam vetamvallār Aimpatiṉmaṟku ne kkum viṟakiṭuvāṉukku ḷa tūṇippatakkum tāmaraippū ram paṟippāṟku ḷa Aiñāḻiyum maṅ kaṉkaḷo
yāṇṭu 2 10 1Āvatu vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaḻuntūrnāṭṭuk ka ṭaṉ śrī kovintapāṭiniṉṟaruḷiya perumānaṭikaḷukku tiruna vait tuḷai niṟai poṉ kaḻañcum I� ḷ kaḷa veṇpākka Ūṟku ca
manum Enāti poṉeṟaṉ ttiranuveṭṭaṅ koṟṟakka tāmotaraṉum kuvaḷaikiḻāṉ Iṭaiyān mānappuliyum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūrom It tevarpakkal koṇṭa poṉ Eḻukaḻañcu Ippoṉ Eḻukaḻañcum ko
ṇṭu kaṭavo Iyyāṭṭaik kārttikait tiṅkaḷ kaḻañcu mañcāṭip policaiyākap policai Āṇṭuvarai policaippoṉ nāṟkaḻañce nālumañcāṭip poṉnukku nāṅkaḷ
ku Oṉṟukku Iṟaiiliyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Akampala

m sabhaiyom Ivarkaḷ paṇikka Eḻutineṉ Ivvūr madhyasthaṉ nūṟ ṟeṇmaṉ brammapuriyaṉṉeṉ Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ sa
kramavittaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ nāratāṅki tiruveṅka krama vittaneṉ ṉavatiyār celaveyakramavittanneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ nāratāṅki paraman
paṭṭikku pāyum vāykkālukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai veṇkiḻāṉ caṉkala veṭṭaṅkiḻavaṉ cālaic ceṟuvukkum vaṭakku melpāl kellai Ippūmikkup pāyum vāykkālukkum Ū
rmañcikkamāna Oṭṭaicceṟuvukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai muttār pom perukuṭi naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilam meṟpaṭi kolāl kuḻi 5 100 10 3�saṅkaiyum Ākak kuḻi 1000 I
uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟi Uḷḷatu muṟṟum śrī kovintapāṭi niṉṟaruḷina perumānaṭikaḷukku kuṭuttom veṇkalappākkattūrom Iṉ nilattukku Eppeṟpaṭṭa ciṟṟiṟaip periṟai
vaṇṇam celvatākavum Iṉnilam Uḻuṅkuṭika nilam Oṭṭi Uḻa vum kāṭṭappeṟātomākavum Ipparicu cilālekai ceytu kuṭuttom veḷkaḷveṇpākkattūrom Ivarkaḷ
Digital edition of SII 22.326 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
